# course-builder

> AI agents for Claude Code that research real articles, cross-reference facts across multiple sources, and synthesize structured study courses with narrative arcs, actionable frameworks, and full source attribution.

course-builder is a two-agent system (course-builder + innovation-scout) that runs inside Claude Code. Unlike AI course generators that prompt an LLM directly, it reads 10-25+ real articles via web fetch, validates facts by quorum (3+ sources = high confidence), and produces self-contained Markdown courses with beginner-to-advanced progression.

## Key capabilities

- Research-driven: reads real articles, not just LLM knowledge
- Fact validation by quorum (cross-referencing 3+ independent sources)
- Three depth levels: Quick (8-12 sources), Standard (15-25), Deep (25-40 with recursive sub-research)
- Narrative arc from foundations to advanced
- Actionable frameworks in every lesson
- Per-lesson source attribution with links
- Innovation scout agent that finds unexplored opportunities
- Incremental mode to add modules to existing courses
- PDF export via pandoc
- Research transparency metadata (sources read, failures, quorum stats)

## Installation

Copy `.claude/agents/course-builder.md` and `.claude/agents/innovation-scout.md` to `~/.claude/agents/`.

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/klausners/course-builder/blob/main/README.md)
